flags.message: The configured CourtListener MCP server failed on every call with a server-side configuration error ('REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store'), so this forward-mode cell had no CourtListener retrieval despite unrestricted mode. The prediction rests on the provisioned snapshot/documents, the statpack, and fedcourts query priors. Worth checking the MCP server provisioning before the next predict run.

The predict prompt tells cert predictors to anchor on the 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section of metrics/statpack.md, but the committed statpack has no such section (only overall/by-court/by-topic/by-circuit/by-Term tables, all blended with merits-era labels). Either the statpack needs regenerating or the prompt reference is stale.
